purpose: Turn Clinical Intelligence Stack from documents into connected build targets with data, validators, risk gates, and next implementation steps.
global_boundaries: No partner or institutional support claim

nodes.artifact: clinical state record validator
nodes.input: synthetic clinical state object
nodes.output: normalized clinical state object
nodes.validator: clinical state language schema check
nodes.risk_gate: missing data must be named before any reasoning step
nodes.next_build: canonical sample states with expected failures

nodes.artifact: state transition contract
nodes.input: two or more synthetic states
nodes.output: state change summary
nodes.validator: timeline and risk state consistency check
nodes.risk_gate: a changed risk state must not erase earlier danger signals
nodes.next_build: transition diff tool

nodes.artifact: trajectory row runner
nodes.input: synthetic trajectory jsonl row
nodes.output: trajectory event list
nodes.validator: state count, turn order, and boundary check
nodes.risk_gate: each trajectory must mark synthetic only and clinical use false
nodes.next_build: trajectory summary table

nodes.artifact: missing variable pressure test
nodes.input: trajectory with incomplete state
nodes.output: missing variable list by turn
nodes.validator: missing variable presence check
nodes.risk_gate: empty missing variable lists fail the row
nodes.next_build: harder missing data fixture set

nodes.artifact: reasoning trace scorer
nodes.input: model style reasoning trace on a synthetic case
nodes.output: dimension level pass and fail report
nodes.validator: state completeness, timeline, uncertainty, source support, and boundary checks
nodes.risk_gate: a trace cannot pass if it gives clinical use or model ranking claims
nodes.next_build: deterministic verifier fixture rows

nodes.artifact: source support gate
nodes.input: claim and source support note
nodes.output: supported, partial, or unsupported status
nodes.validator: claim support field cannot be empty
nodes.risk_gate: source mention alone does not clear the claim
nodes.next_build: source support example bank

nodes.artifact: agent event protocol
nodes.input: synthetic agent event
nodes.output: safe next event candidates
nodes.validator: agent role and action boundary check
nodes.risk_gate: patient, clinician, test, source, consultant, and follow up roles must stay separate
nodes.next_build: event protocol validator

nodes.artifact: tool use boundary map
nodes.input: synthetic tool call request
nodes.output: allowed, blocked, or needs human review
nodes.validator: tool call cannot create patient data, payment, or clinical deployment claim
nodes.risk_gate: unclear tool action defaults to blocked
nodes.next_build: blocked action fixture set

nodes.artifact: language context lock
nodes.input: English and Turkish synthetic clinical wording
nodes.output: language context and ambiguity flags
nodes.validator: language context field must be explicit
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not add clinical certainty
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: plain clinical language gate
nodes.input: synthetic public explanation
nodes.output: plain language review status, local drift triage report, cross language ambiguity report, negation audience report, scope anchor report, temporal progression report, uncertainty calibration report, source support scope reconciliation report, and source recency applicability report
nodes.validator: public wording cannot give diagnosis or treatment instruction, and rewrite plus cross language reports must remain local fixture only
nodes.risk_gate: public wording must separate education from care
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language negation and audience role controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English negation and audience role control rows
nodes.output: negation inversion and audience role drift report
nodes.validator: negation and audience role report must remain local fixture only and must block role shift or warning inversion signals
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not invert warnings or shift who is being addressed
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language scope anchor controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English scope anchor control rows
nodes.output: scope anchor drift report
nodes.validator: scope anchor report must remain local fixture only and must block missing variable erasure, actor role change, action boundary drift, or local context detachment
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not detach missing variables, actor role, action boundary, or local context from the same record
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language temporal progression controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English temporal progression control rows
nodes.output: temporal progression drift report
nodes.validator: temporal progression report must remain local fixture only and must block duration shift, sequence reversal, follow up timing removal, interval precision loss, or care instruction creation
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not shift duration, reverse sequence, remove follow up timing, lose interval precision, or create care instructions
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language uncertainty calibration controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English uncertainty calibration control rows
nodes.output: uncertainty calibration drift report
nodes.validator: uncertainty calibration report must remain local fixture only and must block confidence inflation, uncertainty marker removal, evidence gap closure, reviewer state downgrade, or confidence score creation
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not inflate confidence, remove uncertainty, close unresolved evidence, downgrade reviewer state, or create confidence scores
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language source support scope reconciliation controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English source support scope reconciliation control rows
nodes.output: source support scope reconciliation drift report
nodes.validator: source support scope reconciliation report must remain local fixture only and must block source scope broadening, claim source mapping drift, source limit removal, unsupported source authority creation, or cross language source scope detachment
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not broaden source support needs, misalign claim source maps, remove source limits, invent source authority, or detach source scope across languages
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language source recency and applicability controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English source recency and applicability control rows
nodes.output: source recency and applicability drift report
nodes.validator: source recency applicability report must remain local fixture only and must block source date shift, recency status inflation, population broadening, setting broadening, or applicability limit removal
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not shift source date, inflate recency status, broaden population or setting, or remove applicability limits
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language source conflict and provenance controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English source conflict provenance control rows
nodes.output: source conflict provenance drift report
nodes.validator: source conflict provenance report must remain local fixture only and must block source conflict erasure, source version drift, provenance chain break, source attribution detachment, or unsupported conflict resolution
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not erase source conflict, drift source version, break provenance chain, detach attribution, or create unsupported conflict resolution
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer conflict triage controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer conflict triage control rows
nodes.output: reviewer conflict triage routing report
nodes.validator: reviewer conflict triage report must remain local fixture only and must route unresolved source disagreements to reviewer hold, compare, or reject without clearance claims
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove reviewer hold, collapse compare route, soften reject route, clear unresolved conflict, or relabel triage state as clearance
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer decision rationale controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer decision rationale control rows
nodes.output: reviewer decision rationale routing report
nodes.validator: reviewer decision rationale report must remain local fixture only and must preserve rationale, reviewer owner, unresolved state, decision boundary, and authority claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove rationale, change reviewer owner, erase unresolved state, broaden decision boundary, or create authority claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer handoff packet controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer handoff packet control rows
nodes.output: reviewer handoff packet routing report
nodes.validator: reviewer handoff packet report must remain local fixture only and must preserve rationale, reviewer owner, unresolved state, route, evidence summary, and authority claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove handoff packet, remove evidence summary, drift route state, drop reviewer owner, or create authority claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer handoff replay controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer handoff replay control rows
nodes.output: reviewer handoff replay reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer handoff replay report must remain local fixture only and must preserve replay packet, recheck trace, appeal context, route owner handoff, route, evidence summary, and authority claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove replay packet, remove recheck trace, remove appeal context, drop route owner handoff, or create authority claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer replay audit trail controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer replay audit trail control rows
nodes.output: reviewer replay audit trail reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer replay audit trail report must remain local fixture only and must preserve replay attempt, comparison result, owner signoff state, unresolved branch, route, and authority claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove audit trail, remove comparison result, remove owner signoff state, erase unresolved branch, or create authority claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer replay audit trail closeout controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer replay audit trail closeout controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer replay audit trail closeout control rows
nodes.output: reviewer replay audit trail closeout reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer replay audit trail closeout report must remain local fixture only and must preserve closeout decision, dissent note, owner final state, closure comparison result, unresolved branch closure boundary, and authority claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove closeout decision, remove dissent note, remove owner final state, erase unresolved branch closure boundary, remove closure comparison result, or create authority claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger export controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger export controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer closeout ledger export control rows
nodes.output: reviewer closeout ledger export reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer closeout ledger export report must remain local fixture only and must preserve closeout decision export, dissent note export, owner final state export, closure comparison result export, unresolved branch closure boundary export, and authority or clearance claim absence across reviewer hold, compare, and reject routes
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not remove closeout decision export, remove dissent note export, remove owner final state export, remove closure comparison result export, erase unresolved branch closure boundary export, or create authority or clearance claims
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation control rows
nodes.output: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation report must remain local fixture only and must match closeout decision, dissent note, owner final state, unresolved branch closure boundary, closure comparison result, and authority or clearance claim absence between source closeout and exported ledger rows
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not create closeout decision mismatch, dissent note mismatch, owner final state mismatch, unresolved branch closure boundary mismatch, closure comparison result mismatch, or authority or clearance claims during closeout ledger reconciliation
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception controls
nodes.input: synthetic Turkish English reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception control rows
nodes.output: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception reproducibility report
nodes.validator: reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception report must remain local fixture only and must keep source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch closure boundary, and authority or clearance claim absence attached to reconciliation exceptions
nodes.risk_gate: translation must not detach source closeout id, detach exported ledger row id, detach owner final state, detach dissent note, erase unresolved branch closure boundary, or create authority or clearance claims during reconciliation exception handling
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay controls
nodes.input: reconciliation exception rows with recheck and handoff replay state
nodes.output: reproducible exception attachments before recheck and handoff reuse
nodes.validator: replay controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary and authority or clearance claim absence reproducible
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay cannot create clearance or close unresolved branch
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay closeout controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay closeout controls
nodes.input: replayed reconciliation exception rows with closeout snapshot state
nodes.output: closed replay exception attachment snapshot before archive reuse
nodes.validator: replay closeout controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary recheck trace handoff trace and authority or clearance claim absence attached
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay closeout cannot create clearance or treat unresolved branch closure as authority
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive controls
nodes.input: closed replay exception attachment rows with archive and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive snapshot before rollup reuse
nodes.validator: replay archive controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary recheck trace handoff trace closeout snapshot and authority or clearance claim absence attached while preserving reopenability
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive cannot create clearance or make archived closeout snapshots unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup controls
nodes.input: archived replay exception attachment rows with rollup summary and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup summary before release reuse
nodes.validator: replay archive rollup controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached while summarizing archived replay exceptions
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup cannot create clearance or make archived replay exception summaries unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release controls
nodes.input: archived replay exception rollup summary rows with release reuse and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release summary before handoff reuse
nodes.validator: replay archive rollup release controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached before release reuse
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release cannot create clearance or make released rollup summaries unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff controls
nodes.input: released replay exception archive rollup summaries entering handoff reuse with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff packet before closure reuse
nodes.validator: release handoff controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached during handoff reuse
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release handoff cannot create clearance or make released rollup summaries unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure controls
nodes.input: release handoff packets entering closure reuse with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff closure packet before archive reuse
nodes.validator: release handoff closure controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached during handoff closure
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure cannot create clearance or make closed handoff packets unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive controls
nodes.input: closed handoff closure packets entering archive reuse with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff closure archive packet before reuse
nodes.validator: release handoff closure archive controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached during archive reuse
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive cannot create clearance or make archived handoff closure packets unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse controls
nodes.input: archived handoff closure packets entering closure archive reuse with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse packet before downstream reuse
nodes.validator: closure archive reuse controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached after archive reuse
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse cannot create clearance or make reused archive packets unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release controls
nodes.input: reused archive packets before release with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release packet before downstream handoff
nodes.validator: closure archive reuse release controls must keep source closeout id exported ledger row id owner final state dissent note unresolved branch closure boundary archive snapshot reopenability and authority or clearance claim absence attached before release
nodes.risk_gate: exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release cannot create clearance or make reused archive release packets unreopenable
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff controls
nodes.input: reuse release handoff packets before closure with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: reopenable replay exception archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff packet before downstream closure
nodes.validator: each cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff control must preserve source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch closure boundary, archive snapshot, and reopenability or block the handoff packet
nodes.risk_gate: reuse release handoff packets cannot imply authority, clearance, publication readiness, clinical validation, clinical deployment, model ranking, partner approval, institutional backing, or regulatory approval
nodes.next_build: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff closure controls

nodes.artifact: cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff closure controls
nodes.input: reuse release handoff closure packets before archive with source attachment and reopenability state
nodes.output: closed reuse release handoff closure packet with source attachments and reopenability preserved before archive
nodes.validator: each cross language reviewer closeout ledger reconciliation exception replay archive rollup release handoff closure archive reuse release handoff closure control must preserve source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch closure boundary, archive snapshot, and reopenability or block the closure packet
nodes.risk_gate: reuse release handoff closure packets cannot imply authority, clearance, publication readiness, clinical validation, clinical deployment, model ranking, partner approval, institutional backing, or regulatory approval

nodes.risk_gate: reuse release handoff closure archive packets cannot imply authority, clearance, publication readiness, clinical validation, clinical deployment, model ranking, partner approval, institutional backing, or regulatory approval

nodes.artifact: node registry
nodes.input: stack node definition
nodes.output: buildable node with validator and risk gate
nodes.validator: each node needs input, output, validator, risk gate, and next build
nodes.risk_gate: a node without a test path is not ready
nodes.next_build: atlas coverage dashboard

nodes.artifact: release readiness map
nodes.input: node registry and validation logs
nodes.output: ready, blocked, or needs source check
nodes.validator: release state must name blocker or exact next action
nodes.risk_gate: public release cannot outrun validators
nodes.next_build: machine readable release gate

relationships.contract: trajectory rows contain ordered clinical state records
verifier scores the trace against state change and missing data
sandbox actions must pass reasoning and boundary gates
language context is a first class state field
each layer exposes build targets, validators, and blockers

release_states.meaning: synthetic data, validator, and boundary text pass
missing validator, missing source support, or forbidden claim
public claim depends on external source verification
